title: UI: Replace native select with shadcn Select in user-segments
description:
## Issue
Native <select> used instead of shadcn Select component.

## Fix Required
Replace with shadcn <Select> for consistency.

## Files
- `components/admin-console/user-segments.tsx`

title: STYLE: Standardize file headers across admin components
description:
## Issue
Inconsistent file header formats across components.

## Fix Required
Standardize to TypeScript template per CLAUDE.md:
```typescript
/**
 * File:        components/admin-console/...
 * Module:      ...
 * Purpose:     ...
 */

## Files
- user-management.tsx
- orders-management.tsx
- fund-management.tsx
- kyc-queue.tsx
- And check other admin components

title: UI: Fix notification filter buttons overflow on mobile
description:
## Issue
Filter buttons may overflow on small screens.

## Fix Required
Wrap in flex flex-wrap container.

## Files
- `components/admin-console/enhanced-notification-center.tsx`

title: PERF: Add debounce to client ID filter in session table
description:
## Issue
Filter fires on every keystroke, no debounce.

## Fix Required
Add useDebouncedCallback similar to audit trail pattern.

## Files
- `components/admin-console/session-security-management.tsx`

title: UX: Add empty state message to sessions table
description:
## Issue
No empty state message when sessions array is empty.

## Fix Required
Add empty state with icon and helpful message.

## Files
- `components/admin-console/session-security-management.tsx`

title: DATA: Fix userActivity always empty in parseAnalyticsJson
description:
## Issue
userActivity always empty array even when API returns it. Line 97.

## Fix Required
Wire up correctly or remove from parsed output.

## Files
- `components/admin-console/advanced-analytics.tsx`

title: BUG: Fix colSpan mismatch in financial-reports withdrawal table
description:
## Issue
Table header has 9 columns but loading/empty states use colSpan={10}.

## Fix Required
Change colSpan={10} to colSpan={9} at lines 758, 765.

## Files
- `components/admin-console/financial-reports.tsx`

title: BUG: Fix handleBulkDelete stub - implement or remove dead UI
description:
## Issue
handleBulkDelete is stubbed with TODO. Button exists but does nothing.

## Fix Required
Remove dead UI or implement the API endpoint.

## Files
- `components/admin-console/enhanced-notification-center.tsx`

title: UX: Replace browser alert() with toast() in cleanup-management
description:
## Issue
alert() used at lines 120, 130, 141 instead of toast.

## Fix Required
Replace with toast() or AlertDialog for destructive confirmations.

## Files
- `components/admin-console/cleanup-management.tsx`

title: A11Y: Add labels to Run-once limit and Max age inputs in workers
description:
## Issue
Placeholder text as only label. WCAG violation.

## Fix Required
Add <Label> component similar to PnL mode field.

## Files
- `components/admin-console/workers.tsx`

title: ERR: Fix silent error swallowing in orders bulk operations
description:
## Issue
Empty catch blocks at lines 415, 438 hide 100% failure from admin.

## Fix Required
Track successes/failures. Show partial success toast with counts.

## Files
- `components/admin-console/orders-management.tsx`

title: A11Y: Add accessible labels to Create Position dialog inputs
description:
## Issue
Create Position dialog has unlabeled inputs. WCAG violation.

## Fix Required
Add <label> or aria-label to all form fields.

## Files
- `components/admin-console/positions-management.tsx`

title: AUTH: Add credentials: include to admin API fetch calls
description:
## Issue
cleanup-management.tsx, dashboard.tsx, workers.tsx missing credentials: "include" on fetch calls.

## Fix Required
Add `credentials: "include"` to all cookie-authenticated admin API calls.

## Files
- `components/admin-console/cleanup-management.tsx` (4 calls)
- `components/admin-console/dashboard.tsx` (4 calls)
- `components/admin-console/workers.tsx` (2 calls)

title: SEC: Remove hardcoded credential from mock user data
description:
## Issue
mpin: "1234" in mock user data at line 306.

## Fix Required
Remove mpin field from mockUsers entirely.

## Files
- `components/admin-console/user-management.tsx`

title: LOG: Replace all console.log with Pino logger across admin components
description:
## Issue
40+ console.log/console.error instances across 7 files violate logging policy.

## Files to fix
- settings.tsx (19 instances)
- rm-management.tsx (6 instances)
- dashboard.tsx (4 instances)
- enhanced-notification-center.tsx (5 instances)
- referrals-management.tsx (4 instances)
- admin-console-shell.tsx (1 instance)
- fund-management.tsx (1 instance)

## Fix Required
Replace with: `import { logger } from "@/lib/logger"` and use structured logging.

title: VAL: Add validation for date range in audit-trail
description:
## Issue
No validation preventing dateTo before dateFrom.

## Fix Required
Add inline error message. Disable Apply when validation fails.

## Files
- `components/admin-console/audit-trail.tsx`

title: VAL: Replace freeform Input with Select for order type/side
description:
## Issue
Order type and side use freeform Input instead of Select. Accepts invalid values.

## Fix Required
Replace with shadcn Select with enum values: LIMIT, MARKET, STOP_LOSS / BUY, SELL

## Files
- `components/admin-console/positions-management.tsx`

title: STAB: Add error boundary around recharts in system-health
description:
## Issue
Recharts component with no error boundary — page crashes on malformed data.

## Fix Required
Wrap in ErrorBoundary with fallback UI.

## Files
- `app/(admin)/admin-console/system-health/page.tsx`

title: STAB: Fix unsafe error.message access in rm-management.tsx
description:
## Issue
error.message accessed without instanceof Error check. Lines 313-317, 393-399.

## Fix Required
`const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Failed to load"`

## Files
- `components/admin-console/rm-management.tsx`

title: MOB: Fix touch target size on close button in trades-blotter.tsx
description:
## Issue
Close button touch target is 24x24px, should be 44x44px minimum.

## Fix Required
Add `p-2 min-w-[44px] min-h-[44px]` classes to button.

## Files
- `components/admin-console/trades-blotter.tsx`

title: MOB: Replace browser prompt() with modal in fund-management.tsx
description:
## Issue
prompt() used at lines 313-315, 358-359 for transaction/rejection input. Blocks mobile users.

## Fix Required
Replace with shadcn Dialog component. Add labeled input fields for transaction ID and rejection reason.

## Files
- `components/admin-console/fund-management.tsx`

title: XSS: Sanitize userAgent display in audit-trail.tsx
description:
## Issue
userAgent rendered without sanitization at lines 703-704.

## Fix Required
Truncate or escape: `{selected.userAgent?.slice(0, 500)}`

- `components/admin-console/audit-trail.tsx`

title: XSS: Escape table cell values in financial-reports.tsx
description:
## Issue
Table cell values rendered without escaping at lines 662-668.

## Fix Required
Apply consistent escaping to all string fields. Use formatInr for numeric values.

- `components/admin-console/financial-reports.tsx`

title: XSS: Escape user-controlled strings in financial-overview.tsx
description: ## Issue User-controlled strings (record.reason, record.remarks) rendered without sanitization. ## Fix Required 1. Line 622, 809: Escape HTML entities before rendering 2. Use pattern: `{escapeHtml(value)}` ## Files - `components/admin-console/financial-overview.tsx`
